other_findings.finding: Reynolds Supplementary Table S1, which contains per-cluster DEGs, was not accessible via the PMC supplemental material API or Europe PMC full text API. The cluster-to-group mapping was found in the Figure 4d legend of the full text PDF. Per-cluster marker genes beyond CDK1/PCNA would require Table S1 or the ArrayExpress deposit (E-MTAB-8142).

evidence_quotes.quote: undifferentiated KC (clusters 1, 5), proliferating (cluster 2), differentiated KC (clusters 3, 4, 6, 7), differentiated KC* (cluster 8)
evidence_quotes.context: Complete cluster-to-group mapping for all 8 keratinocyte Leiden clusters

evidence_quotes.quote: Proliferating keratinocytes (CDK1+,PCNA+) have lower expression of suprabasal cell transcripts e.g. KRT1, KRT10 that characterize differentiated keratinocytes
evidence_quotes.context: Marker genes for the proliferating keratinocyte group
